en: We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence, then, is not an act, but a habit.
zh: 人即其习惯的总和。因此，卓越不是一种行为，而是一种习惯。
author: Aristotle

en: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.
zh: 实现明天理想的唯一障碍，是今天的疑虑。
author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

en: In the middle of difficulty lies opportunity.
author: Albert Einstein

en: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
zh: 成就伟业的唯一途径是热爱你所做的事。
author: Steve Jobs

en: It is during our darkest moments that we must focus to see the light.
zh: 正是在最黑暗的时刻，我们才必须集中精力去看见光明。
author: Aristotle

en: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
zh: 未来属于那些相信梦想之美的人。
author: Eleanor Roosevelt

en: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
zh: 成功不是终点，失败也不是末日，重要的是继续前行的勇气。
author: Winston Churchill
